translations.en: a woman of elegant demeanor, wearing a finely embroidered dress.
translations.zh: 一位氣質優雅的女子，穿著一件精緻刺繡的禮服。

translations.en: "Good $T, Avatar. I'm glad thy travels have brought thee here again."
translations.zh: 「聖者，$T好。吾很高興汝的旅途再次引領汝來到此處。」

translations.en: "Ah, $G $P, the famous Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「啊，大名鼎鼎的聖者 $G $P！」

translations.en: "I have heard much of thy exploits, but never expected to meet you in person."
translations.zh: 「吾早聞汝的英雄事蹟，卻未曾料到能親身相遇。」

translations.en: "'Tis indeed an honor."
translations.zh: 「此乃無上榮幸。」

translations.en: "I am Lady Isabella. Thy name, of course, is well @known throughout the land."
translations.zh: 「吾乃伊莎貝拉夫人。汝的名號自然是@聞名天下的。」

translations.en: "The tales of thy exploits are known by even the smallest of children."
translations.zh: 「汝的事蹟故事，連最小的孩童也耳熟能詳。」

translations.en: "I recognized thee from the portrait @Woodroffe made the last time thou came to our land."
translations.zh: 「吾是從@伍德羅夫上次汝蒞臨時所繪的肖像認出汝的。」

translations.en: "One of the finest artisans that ever dwelt in Minoc."
translations.zh: 「他是曾在密諾克居住過最傑出的工匠之一。」

translations.en: "Alas, he died of the @flu two years ago."
translations.zh: 「可惜，他兩年前因@流感而離世了。」

translations.en: "Aye, a pity, that."
translations.zh: 「是的，實屬可惜。」

translations.en: "'Tis my privilege to be mayor of Minoc, the city of @sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「擔任密諾克——@奉獻之城的市長，是吾的榮幸。」

translations.en: "We are renowned for our fine @craftsmen."
translations.zh: 「吾城以優秀的@工匠聞名。」

translations.en: "The artisan's guild is located here."
translations.zh: 「工匠公會就設在這裡。」

translations.en: "We were entrusted with the @Rune of Sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「吾等受託保管@奉獻聖符。」

translations.en: "I gave it to @Selganor, the @artisan's guildmaster."
translations.zh: 「吾將它交給了@瑟爾嘉諾——@工匠公會的會長。」

translations.en: "When the Rune of Sacrifice was sent to our city, I entrusted it to their care."
translations.zh: 「奉獻聖符送至吾城時，吾便將它託付給他們保管。」

translations.en: "He's a fine @musician. He lives just across the road from me, in the @guild hall."
translations.zh: 「他是位出色的@音樂家。他就住在吾對面的@公會大廳裡。」

translations.en: "If I weren't so @busy, I'd take lessons from him myself."
translations.zh: 「如果吾不是那麼@忙碌，吾自己也想向他拜師學藝。」

translations.en: "Aye, this is a big city."
translations.zh: 「是的，這是座大城市。」

translations.en: "The good healer @Tara should be able to tell you the mantra."
translations.zh: 「善良的治療師@塔拉應該能告訴汝咒語。」

translations.en: "Go ask at her house, on the north side of town."
translations.zh: 「去城北她的住所詢問吧。」

translations.en: "Tara is a very compassionate woman."
translations.zh: 「塔拉是個非常富有同情心的女子。」

translations.en: "I've heard rumors of such creatures, but I know no one who has actually seen one."
translations.zh: 「吾聽過關於這種生物的傳言，但不認識任何真正見過的人。」

translations.en: "Yes, ask Selganor."
translations.zh: 「是的，去問瑟爾嘉諾吧。」

translations.en: "Farewell, and please honor us with your presence again soon."
translations.zh: 「珍重，請早日再度蒞臨。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「吾幫不上這件事的忙。」

translations.en: "Ah, thou wouldst be interested to hear of that."
translations.zh: 「啊，汝對此應該會感興趣。」

translations.en: "The balloonist flew off on an important @mission, and never returned."
translations.zh: 「那位氣球師飛去執行一項重要的@任務，便再也沒有回來。」

translations.en: "Selganor should be able to tell you more about it."
translations.zh: 「瑟爾嘉諾應該能告訴汝更多。」

translations.en: "Tell me, is it true you once rode in a balloon whilst on the quest of the Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「告訴吾，汝在聖者任務中曾乘坐氣球飛行，這是真的嗎？」

translations.en: "Ah, well..."
"Some tales are but empty words, with less substance than the breath that carries them."
translations.zh: 「有些故事不過是空話，比吹送它們的氣息還要虛無。」

translations.en: "It must have been wonderful, to drift amongst the very clouds..."
translations.zh: 「在雲間漂泊，那一定妙不可言……」

translator_notes: 伊莎貝拉是密諾克的優雅女市長。她把奉獻聖符交給工匠公會長瑟爾嘉諾保管。知道治療師塔拉懂奉獻咒語。對氣球師失蹤一事知情，建議詢問瑟爾嘉諾。
